title: Create Treatment Images Showing Eye-Catching Results | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Create Treatment Images Showing Eye-Catching Results ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: So you can't quite capture the result that you've created in your photographs it's a super common problem and you need to think a lot about your photography skills [Music] so if you have a look at pictures where people are getting great results often the photography is a very big…

segments.text: so you can't quite capture the result that you've created in your photographs it's a super common problem and you need to think a lot about your photography skills [Music] so if you have a look at pictures where people are getting great results often the photography is a very big reason why that result looks so good and the type of things that can affect that would be the shadowing of the lighting the direction that light is coming from so if you're trying to capture a cheek result for example you need something that highlights a degree of the shadow if you completely obliterate all the shadows on the face you won't see the contours so the direction of the light is very important the angle of your of the head is also important for the same reason so if you're trying to capture a cheek result it's very hard to do that if you're taking the picture straight on you might want to just capture the profile of the face and finally also consider the background because often what we're trying to do is you're trying to get your the facial features to stand out against the background because that's how i will differentiate the real shape of something so

if you have a very distracting busy background you may not be as clear to your mind's eye what shape is how the shape has changed so get a plain background preferably a gray background or maybe blue or green but something that has is darker than most caucasian people's skin and that way you can see that and differentiate the contours you

transcript: so you can't quite capture the result that you've created in your photographs it's a super common problem and you need to think a lot about your photography skills [Music] so if you have a look at pictures where people are getting great results often the photography is a very big reason why that result looks so good and the type of things that can affect that would be the shadowing of the lighting the direction that light is coming from so if you're trying to capture a cheek result for example you need something that highlights a degree of the shadow if you completely obliterate all the shadows on the face you won't see the contours so the direction of the light is very important the angle of your of the head is also important for the same reason so if you're trying to capture a cheek result it's very hard to do that if you're taking the picture straight on you might want to just capture the profile of the face and finally also consider the background because often what we're trying to do is you're trying to get your the facial features to stand out against the background because that's how i will differentiate the real shape of something so if you have a very distracting busy background you may not be as clear to your mind's eye what shape is how the shape has changed so get a plain background preferably a gray background or maybe blue or green but something that has is darker than most caucasian people's skin and that way you can see that and differentiate the contours you
